parcels.body: Need to send a package without travelling yourself? Contact the driver directly to arrange pickup and delivery.

legal.termsBody:
1. Service

Notos South Taxi (operated by Martin Preci, hereinafter "the Operator") provides licensed taxi and private transfer services in Athens and across Greece.

2. Booking & payment

To confirm a booking, the Customer pays a non-refundable €5 booking fee via Viva Wallet. This fee is part of the total fare. The remaining balance (total fare minus €5) is paid in cash to the driver on the day of service. The minimum total fare is €15. A deposit of 15% of the total fare is charged online at the time of booking (which includes the €5 booking fee where applicable).

3. Advance notice for vans & coaches

Bookings for vans (up to 8) and coaches (up to 24) require at least 1 hour notice before the pickup time. For shorter notice please call or message the Operator directly.

4. Cancellation policy

Bookings cancelled at least 24 hours before the pickup time are eligible for a full refund of the deposit. The €5 booking fee is non-refundable. Cancellations made within 24 hours of pickup, or no-shows, forfeit the full deposit. The Operator may cancel a booking in cases of force majeure and will refund the full deposit including the booking fee.

5. Pricing

Fixed-route prices are all-inclusive. Custom destinations are quoted using a base fare plus per-kilometre rate, with a minimum fare of €15. Surcharges apply for vehicle type, child seats, oversize luggage, and night-time pickup (00:00–05:00).

6. Liability

The Operator carries the insurance required by Greek law. Liability for delays caused by traffic, weather, or third parties is limited to the cost of the booking.

7. Lost items

The Operator will help recover items left in the vehicle, but is not responsible for personal belongings.

8. Governing law

These terms are governed by Greek law. Disputes are subject to the courts of Athens.
legal.privacyBody:
1. Data Controller

Martin Preci, Apollonos 10, Vouliagmeni 166 71, Greece. Contact: precimartin4@gmail.com.

2. Data we collect

To process a booking we collect: full name, email, phone number, pickup/drop-off addresses, date and time, optional flight number, payment confirmation reference. We do not store payment card details — these are handled directly by Viva Wallet (PCI-DSS compliant).

3. Purpose & legal basis

Performance of the transport contract (Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR). The driver receives a WhatsApp message with the booking details so the trip can be performed.

4. Retention

Your booking data (name, contact details, pickup and drop-off) is automatically deleted within 48 hours of the scheduled trip time. Proof of payment is retained by our payment provider, Viva Wallet, for the period required by Greek tax law (currently 5 years); we do not separately store your operational personal data beyond that window.

5. Recipients

We share booking data only with the service providers needed to perform your trip: Viva Wallet (payment processing), Upstash (secure booking database), Resend (sending your confirmation email and notifying the driver by email), CallMeBot (WhatsApp notification to the driver), and Geoapify and Google Maps (address autocomplete and distance calculation if you enter a custom address). These providers act as our processors and may only use the data to provide their service to us.

6. International transfers

Some of our processors (for example Resend, Google, and Vercel) are based outside the European Economic Area, mainly in the United States. Where your data is transferred outside the EEA, it is protected by appropriate safeguards, such as the European Commission's Standard Contractual Clauses or an adequacy decision.

7. Your rights

Access, rectification, erasure, restriction, portability, objection, and the right to lodge a complaint with the Hellenic Data Protection Authority (www.dpa.gr).

8. Cookies & analytics

We use only essential cookies, needed to keep your booking session active and to remember your language choice. We do not use advertising or cross-site tracking cookies. For anonymous, aggregated visitor statistics we use Vercel Web Analytics, which is cookieless: it sets no cookies and stores no persistent identifier or directly identifying data. Vercel acts as our processor for this.
legal.cookiesBody: This site uses only essential cookies, required to keep your booking session active and to remember your language choice. We do not use advertising or cross-site tracking cookies, and we do not share cookies with third parties. We do use Vercel Web Analytics for anonymous, aggregated visitor statistics, but it is cookieless: it sets no cookies and stores no persistent identifier.
legal.cancellationBody:
Free cancellation when made at least 24 hours before the pickup time — full refund of the deposit, no questions asked. Note: the €5 booking fee is non-refundable.

Cancellations made less than 24 hours before pickup, or no-shows, forfeit the full deposit; this clause is explicitly accepted at booking time.

If we cancel for reasons of force majeure (weather, accident, vehicle issue) you receive a full refund including the booking fee, and we will help you arrange an alternative.

about.title: About
about.body: Notos South Taxi is a licensed, owner-operated Athens taxi service run by Martin Preci — based on the Athenian Riviera, with stands at Vouliagmeni and Alimos Marina, available 24 hours a day, seven days a week. Years behind the wheel across Attica and the rest of Greece, comfortable English, and on time every time. Standard taxi for couples and small families, taxi-van for groups, full coach for tour parties — same driver, same care. We hold your seat with a €5 booking fee so prices stay honest and no-shows don't ruin anyone's trip; the rest is paid in cash to the driver, the way taxis have always worked.

serviceArea.title: Where we pick up
serviceArea.subtitle: Our home turf is the Athenian Riviera. We also collect from across Attica and run the long roads anywhere in Greece.
